modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a field technician and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: User encounters indeterminate error in Titanium Scheduler.

full_description_text: User sees an error message in Titanium Scheduler. It says "Indeterminate Error Type." The application may still work, but it suggests restarting. There is also an object reference issue.
short_description: User encounters indeterminate error in Titanium Scheduler.
description: User sees an error message in Titanium Scheduler. It says "Indeterminate Error Type." The application may still work, but it suggests restarting. There is also an object reference issue.
